use_cases: Displaying user location within site hierarchy for improved orientation
Showing product category paths in e-commerce product listings
Revealing documentation or help center article navigation trails
Indicating file or folder paths in file management interfaces
Guiding users through multi-step forms or checkout flows
ai_summary: A composable breadcrumb navigation system providing atomic components for building hierarchical navigation trails. Features separate primitives for list, items, links, current page indication, separators with icons, and ellipsis for collapsed paths. Clean minimal styling with muted colors and hover states for link interactions.
